title: KPIT Technologies is Hiring: Full Stack Developer (Mid-Level)

jsonLd.title: KPIT Technologies is Hiring: Full Stack Developer (Mid-Level)
jsonLd.description:
KPIT Technologies, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Full Stack Developer for our Ranchi operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About KPIT Technologies:
KPIT Technologies is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Node.js
• Proficiency in Git
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in Rust
• Proficiency in TypeScript
• Proficiency in Docker
• Proficiency in REST APIs

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Flexible working hours
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Professional development and training programs
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Ranchi, Jharkhand, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with KPIT Technologies!
